_comment: This is what the LLM outputs when a user says: 'AI in healthcare, investor pitch deck, 7 slides, modern dark style'
_user_input: AI在醫療領域的應用，給投資人看的 pitch deck，7頁，風格簡約深色
title: MedAI — Transforming Healthcare with Intelligent Diagnostics
author: Johnny Lin

content.title: MedAI
content.subtitle: Transforming Healthcare with Intelligent Diagnostics
content.tagline: Early detection. Better outcomes. Lower costs.

slides.notes: Open with the core value proposition. Emphasize that this is not just AI — it's AI that saves lives and reduces costs.

content.heading: The Problem

items: Diagnostic errors affect 12 million Americans annually (BMJ, 2024)
Average time to diagnosis for rare diseases: 4.8 years
Radiologist burnout at all-time high — 49% report symptoms
Rural hospitals lack specialist coverage for 60% of operating hours
Late-stage cancer detection costs 3-5x more than early-stage

content.footnote: Sources: BMJ Quality & Safety, AHRQ, Medscape Physician Burnout Report 2025

slides.notes: Frame the problem in human terms first, then financial. Investors need to feel the urgency.

items: Explainable AI — shows reasoning, not just answers

slides.notes: Emphasize zero-friction integration. Hospitals hate rip-and-replace.

content.heading: Market Opportunity
content.description: The AI diagnostics market is projected to reach $45.2B by 2030, growing at 34% CAGR.
content.source: Grand View Research, Markets and Markets, internal analysis

slides.notes: Remote diagnostics is the fastest-growing segment — this is our expansion vector.

items: FDA 510(k) cleared for chest X-ray analysis (Nov 2025)
3 hospital systems in paid pilot (Johns Hopkins, Mayo Clinic, Kaohsiung Medical)
92.4% sensitivity / 96.1% specificity on lung nodule detection benchmark
47% reduction in time-to-diagnosis in pilot deployments

slides.notes: Lead with FDA clearance — this is the moat. Follow with credible hospital names.

content.quote: MedAI caught a stage-1 lung nodule that three radiologists had missed. That patient is alive today because of this technology.
content.author: Dr. Sarah Chen
content.role: Chief of Radiology, Johns Hopkins Medicine

slides.notes: Let the doctor tell the story. This is more powerful than any metric.

content.heading: Let's Save Lives Together
content.subtitle: Series A  |  $15M  |  Scaling to 50 hospitals by 2027

slides.notes: Clear ask: $15M Series A. Clear milestone: 50 hospitals. End with contact info.
